text.title: file-reference-passing Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for a ScanResult (refs + rationale) and a SubagentReport (summary + interesting_refs).

example.note: Refs follow the kind:path pattern; rationale is brief and informative.
Content embedded in rationale; defeats the purpose of refs. Validator caps rationale length.

list.item: Rationale is short and contains no embedded content.
Subagent reports never embed file content in `summary`.
